scriptsInfo.check:node: Fails early if the active Node version is older than 22.
scriptsInfo.predev: Runs automatically before npm run dev; checks Node version.
scriptsInfo.prebuild: Runs automatically before npm run build; checks Node version.
scriptsInfo.prepreview:host: Runs automatically before npm run preview:host; checks Node version.
scriptsInfo.dev: Starts the Vite development server with live reload, reachable from other devices on the network.
scriptsInfo.build: Builds the production web app into dist/.
scriptsInfo.preview:host: Builds the production app, then serves it on the local network for browser/iPhone testing.
scriptsInfo.sync:version:bump-code: Updates native app version metadata and bumps Android versionCode.
scriptsInfo.android:install: Builds the web app, syncs Capacitor Android, then installs the debug app on a connected Android device.
scriptsInfo.android:install:bump: Bumps package patch version and Android versionCode, then installs the debug app.
scriptsInfo.test: Runs the Node test files such as *.test.js.

scripts.check:node:
node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 22) { console.error('
Node 22+ is required for sporely-web. Current: ' + process.version + '
Use nvm install 22 && nvm use 22
'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.android:install: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew :app:installDebug
scripts.android:install:bump: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run sync:version:bump-code && npm run android:install
